name: BDI-FS
description: The BDI-FS (Beck Depression Inventory - Fast Screen) is a brief questionnaire for assessing cognitive symptoms of depression. It focuses on thoughts and feelings, not physical symptoms.
introText: Please read each statement and select the answer that best describes how you have felt in the last two weeks.

intro.title: Cognitive Depression Symptoms
intro.description: This questionnaire assesses how you think about yourself and your life. Answer the 7 questions honestly – there are no right or wrong answers.
intro.researchNote: Thank you for your openness. Your responses help advance research into the effects associated with ALS.

3.label: Unbearably sad
3.description: I am so sad I can't stand it

0.label: Not discouraged
0.description: I am not discouraged about my future

1.label: Somewhat discouraged
1.description: I am more discouraged than I used to be

2.label: Expect no improvement
2.description: I don't expect things to get better

3.label: Hopeless
3.description: I believe my future is hopeless

0.label: Not a failure
0.description: I don't feel like a failure

1.label: Failed more than I should
1.description: I have failed more than I should have

2.label: Many failures
2.description: Looking back, I see many failures

3.label: Total failure
3.description: I feel like a total failure

0.label: Normal pleasure
0.description: I enjoy things as much as ever

1.label: Less pleasure
1.description: I don't enjoy things as much as I used to

2.label: Little pleasure
2.description: I get very little pleasure from things

0.label: Not self-critical
0.description: I am no more critical of myself than usual

1.label: More critical than before
1.description: I am more critical of myself than before

2.label: Critical of all mistakes
2.description: I criticize myself for all my mistakes

3.label: Blame myself
3.description: I blame myself for everything bad

0.label: No thoughts
0.description: I have no thoughts of hurting myself

1.label: Thoughts present
1.description: I have thoughts of hurting myself, but wouldn't do it

2.label: Would like to
2.description: I would like to hurt myself

3.label: Would do it
3.description: I would hurt myself if I had the chance

interpretations.label: Minimal symptoms
interpretations.description: Your responses suggest no or only minimal symptoms.
